_comment: Witty, Duolingo-style payment reminders sent when the user taps 'Send SMS Now'. Placeholders {name} (recipient's first name) and {amount} (e.g. $12.50) are filled in at send time. Keep them light and friendly.
messages: Hey {name}, your {amount} tab misses you. Pay It? Now? 🥹
{name}, this is your {amount} speaking. I want to go home. 🏠
Knock knock. Who's there? Your {amount} debt. Pay up {name}, Or else . 👀
{name}, I know you owe {amount}. Don't make me blow you up 💣
Friendly reminder, {name}: {amount}. Emphasis on 'friendly'… for now. 😊
{name}, {amount} isn't going to pay itself. Believe me, I asked. 💸
GIVE ME MY {amount}, {name}, PLEASE. 🌹
Your {amount} tab has been waiting so patiently, {name}. Don't test its patience. ⏳
Is it just me, or does {amount} feel like a lot to still owe, {name}? 👉👈
{name}, settling your {amount} would really make my day. And my week. 💚
Breaking news: {name} still owes {amount}. More at 11. 📺
The people demand justice. And by justice I mean your {amount}, {name}. ⚖️
{name}, I'm not mad about the {amount}. Just disappointed. 😔
Hey. {amount} please {name}. Before they bring out the pitchforks. 🔱
Hey {name}, quick math: you − {amount} = us even. Let's do the math. 🧮
{name}, that {amount} could be in my account right now. Just saying. 🤲
It's been a minute, {name}. The {amount} remembers. 🕰️
{name}, paying {amount} now unlocks the achievement: 'Not A Freeloader'. 🏆
No pressure {name}, but {amount} and I are a package deal now and I would like him back. 💍
Hey {name}, I want hotdogs and that {amount} would be great. 🏡
Hey {name}, Im not a detective but it looks like {amount} might be missing from my account. Could I have it back? 🥺
Hey {name}, {amount} would be great. 🙏
Ok {name} empty the piggy bank, I want my {amount} 🐷
What happened to the good times me, you, and {amount} had together? I miss those days. 🥲
Remember how we did that one thing that one time {name}? Yeah, that was fun. Haha. I need my {amount} back. Now. 😅
Hey {name} could I get the time? Maybe also my {amount} back? ⏰
